pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-java from 8.78.3 to 8.78.4 in the openrewrite group
pull_request.body:
Bumps the openrewrite group with 1 update: [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite). Updates `org.openrewrite:rewrite-java` from 8.78.3 to 8.78.4
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java's releases.

8.78.4

What's Changed

  • Fix Javadoc @​see field reference resolution by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7257
  • Go: load recipe modules as plugins for real execution by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#7263
  • Go: automatically visit tree nodes in RPC queues with no onChange callback by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7264
  • Go: StatementExpression registered as a type by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7265
  • Go: Fix parsing of comments in empty argument list by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7267
  • Exclude the version txt file from the build cache by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7266
  • Go: Fix type cast in RPC, literals are not always primitive in Go by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7268
  • Go: Run go native tests as part of the build by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7270
  • Go: fix more cases of comments parsing in empty enumerations by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7269
  • Declare Gradle inputs to tasks for rewrite-csharp and rewrite-python by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7272
  • Go: Fix RPC serialization for varargs by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7271
  • Go: Fix parsing of a trailing comma in argument list by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7273

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.78.3...v8.78.4

Commits
  • d934b7b Fix parsing of a trailing comma in argument list (#7273)
  • f6682ed Scala parser: map This, InterpolatedString, ForEachLoop, and TypeAscription t...
  • d51d23f Go: Fix RPC serialization for varargs (#7271)
  • fbaf874 Declare Gradle inputs to tasks (#7272)
  • ab2af5d Fix more cases of comments in empty enumerations (#7269)
  • 341d1aa Run go native tests too (#7270)
  • 2a229dd Fix type cast, literals are not always primitive in Go (#7268)
  • 7265ee0 Exclude the version txt file from the build cache (#7266)
  • 2edcb6f Fix parsing of comments in empty arg list (#7267)
  • 942105a StatementExpression registered (#7265)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=org.openrewrite:rewrite-java&package-manager=maven&previous-version=8.78.3&new-version=8.78.4)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) You can trigger a rebase of this PR by commenting `@dependabot rebase`.
